issues.sample: Car was sold to me with wrong size front tires . It was a certified car. Had collision and was fix . Drove till mileage service and they reject for wrong tires. But did not fix.. I drove  home and waited for repo. Now car is in repo yard with wrong tires and they want to auction

narrative.headline: What 2020 Lexus Rc owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Wheels (100% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.title: Wheels
